description: Perform an action on a specific connected client. The request body must include the action name and any applicable input arguments.

schema.name: timeLimitMinutes
schema.description: (Optional) how long (in minutes) the guest will be authorized to access the network. If not specified, the default limit is used from the site settings

schema.name: rxRateLimitKbps
schema.description: (Optional) download rate limit in kilobits per second

schema.name: txRateLimitKbps
schema.description: (Optional) upload rate limit in kilobits per second

requestBody.name: timeLimitMinutes
requestBody.description: (Optional) how long (in minutes) the guest will be authorized to access the network. If not specified, the default limit is used from the site settings

requestBody.name: rxRateLimitKbps
requestBody.description: (Optional) download rate limit in kilobits per second

requestBody.name: txRateLimitKbps
requestBody.description: (Optional) upload rate limit in kilobits per second

fields.name: revokedAuthorization
fields.description: (Optional) Revoked authorization in case the guest was already authorized at the time of this request

children.name: authorizedAt
children.description: Timestamp when the guest has been authorized

children.name: expiresAt
children.description: Timestamp when the guest will get automatically unauthorized

children.name: rxRateLimitKbps
children.description: (Optional) download rate limit in kilobits per second

children.name: txRateLimitKbps
children.description: (Optional) upload rate limit in kilobits per second

children.name: authorizedAt
children.description: Timestamp when the guest has been authorized

children.name: expiresAt
children.description: Timestamp when the guest will get automatically unauthorized

children.name: rxRateLimitKbps
children.description: (Optional) download rate limit in kilobits per second

children.name: txRateLimitKbps
children.description: (Optional) upload rate limit in kilobits per second

local.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = json.dumps({
  "action": "string"
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/clients/{clientId}/actions", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Execute Client Action
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/clients/{clientId}/actions"
    method: POST
    body:
      action: string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client
import json


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = json.dumps({
  "action": "string"
})
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>',
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
conn.request("POST", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/clients/{clientId}/actions", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Execute Client Action
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/clients/{clientId}/actions"
    method: POST
    body:
      action: string
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
